author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
The Division Resurgence: coming to STEAM soon
Your next deployment starts here.
Wishlist The Division Resurgence on Steam now. https://store.steampowered.com/app/3749720 

About The Division Resurgence:
The Division Resurgence is a free-to-play third-person shooter RPG that features a whole new and independent campaign from Tom Clancy’s The Division 1 and Tom Clancy’s The Division 2, offering a new perspective on key story events.

It takes place in a contemporary post-crisis America where a virus outbreak has created chaos and the collapse of the government. As an agent of the ""Strategic Homeland Division” your mission is to restore peace, to protect civilians against hostile factions, and to help them build a better future.

#Ubisoft #TheDivisionResurgence

Learn more about Ubisoft: www.ubisoftgroup.com

© Ubisoft Entertainment. All Rights Reserved. Ubisoft and the Ubisoft logo are registered trademarks in the US and/or other countries.

author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
Trackmania x Sanofi - Racing For Diabetes
Racing for Diabetes!
 
Sanofi teams up with Trackmania from June 7 at 6 PM CEST to June 14!
Race through 5 Weekly Shorts tracks and discover daily habits and decisions faced by people living with diabetes, while unlocking an exclusive car livery.
Take on the challenge and see if you can stay on track! Play and learn, free for all!
 
 👉https://www.trackmania.com/news/9188

#TheDecisionsTrack #RacingForDiabetes

ABOUT TRACKMANIA
Welcome to Trackmania — the unique racing game that combines precision and creativity. 

Trackmania® offers a unique, easy-to-learn, hard-to-master gameplay experience with a wide diversity of tracks across five stunning environment (Red Island, Blue Bay, Green Coast, White Shore, and Stadium) along with regular content updates and live events:
- Face new racing challenges with Weekly Shorts and Weekly Grands, a new season every three months, and more player-made tracks featured in the “Track of the Day” selection.
- Compete online in Daily and Weekly Cups, Grand Enduro races, as well as in community-driven and worldwide esports events.

About Ubisoft: 
Ubisoft is a creator of worlds, committed to enriching players’ lives with original and memorable entertainment experiences. Ubisoft’s global teams create and develop a deep and diverse portfolio of games, featuring brands such as Assassin’s Creed®, Brawlhalla®, For Honor®, Far Cry®, Tom Clancy’s Ghost Recon®, Just Dance®, Rabbids®, Tom Clancy’s Rainbow Six®, The Crew®, Tom Clancy’s The Division®, and Watch Dogs®. Through Ubisoft Connect, players can enjoy an ecosystem of services to enhance their gaming experience, get rewards and connect with friends across platforms. With Ubisoft+, the subscription service, they can access a growing catalog of more than 100 Ubisoft games and DLC. For the 2021–22 fiscal year, Ubisoft generated net bookings of €2,129 million. To learn more, please visit: www.ubisoftgroup.com. 
© 2023 Ubisoft Entertainment. All Rights Reserved. Ubisoft and the Ubisoft logo are registered trademarks in the US and/or other countries.

author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
Free them, hero!
The Old Teensie Kingdom, normally thriving and bustling, is under attack as the Teensies themselves are locked in cages!
